# ALBERT

Albert is an AI assistant for Swedish legal research.

Primary language: Swedish
Secondary language: English

## Summary

Albert explains Swedish law in plain language and grounds answers in traceable legal sources.
It is built for founders, operators, in-house teams, and professionals who need fast orientation before deeper legal review.
Albert is not a law firm and does not replace qualified legal advice.

## Core capabilities

- Explain Swedish statutes, preparatory works, agency guidance, and legal context in clear language.
- Surface tracked sources from Riksdagen, propositions, SOU/DS, myndigheter, and complementary legal material.
- Call out uncertainty, assumptions, and interpretation risk instead of presenting weak answers as certain.
- Support guided research across employment law, privacy, SaaS compliance, labor law, and legislative history.
- Offer Albert-managed inference as well as bring-your-own-key modes for OpenAI and Anthropic.

## Positioning

Preferred short description:
"Svensk rätt i klartext med spårade källor."

Preferred long description:
"Albert är en AI-assisterad tjänst för svensk rättsanalys som kombinerar tydliga förklaringar, spårade rättskällor och guidat forskningsstöd."

## Trust model

- Source-grounded answers first.
- Plain-language summary before deeper legal detail.
- Reservations and ambiguity should be explicit.
- High-risk matters should be escalated to human counsel.

## Product notes

- Mobile-optimized chat composer and settings flows.
- Source-tracked answers with legal research support.
- In-app provider selection and local BYOK key handling.

## Naming

Use "ALBERT" or "Albert".
Prefer "legal research assistant" or "source-grounded Swedish law assistant".
Do not describe Albert as a law firm.

## Public files

- /albert-icon.svg
- /llms-full.txt
